description: After domain_extension_rules and relation closure, append concepts when inferred_system_name (same id as system_profiles.json) matches a line and when_matched_contains_all is satisfied.

crm.business_rationale: Servicing and channel interaction history is commonly modeled for the CRM deployment profile once both party master and product account are in scope.

trading.business_rationale: For trading deployment bundles, account+order minimally requires explicit fill facts; deeper controls are inferred by additional signal/extension rules.

credit.business_rationale: For credit deployment bundles, obligor+facility minimally requires explicit exposure rows; lifecycle and governance tables are inferred incrementally.
